en.title: Product Manager
en.description: Responsible for business research, requirement analysis, and functional solution design. Produce PRDs, business flows, and prototype documents to support requirement reviews and solution delivery.

list.title: Key Responsibilities
items: Break down requirement priorities based on business goals and real-world usage scenarios.
Coordinate engineering, testing, and implementation teams across development, integration, launch, and iteration cycles.
Track product feedback and business issues, continuously optimizing workflows and interaction experience.
Leverage technical background to balance business value, implementation cost, and delivery timeline.

zh.title: 产品经理
zh.description: 负责业务需求调研、需求分析与功能方案设计，输出 PRD、业务流程、原型说明等文档，支撑需求评审与方案落地。

list.title: 核心内容
items: 结合业务目标与实际使用场景拆解需求优先级，协调研发、测试、实施等团队推进开发联调、上线验收与版本迭代。
跟踪产品使用反馈与业务问题，持续优化功能流程与交互体验，提升系统可用性与交付效率。
依托技术背景快速理解系统实现逻辑，能够在业务价值、开发成本与交付周期之间进行平衡，提升跨团队沟通效率。

zh.institution: 广州影子科技有限公司

en.title: Full Stack Developer (Frontend-Focused)
en.description: Delivered frontend and backend development for enterprise platforms and business systems, participating in architecture design, feature implementation, and deployment delivery.

list.title: Key Responsibilities
items: Worked across Vue, React, and Nest-based systems with end-to-end delivery ownership from requirement understanding to implementation.
Led development of core modules and internal tool platforms to improve reuse, delivery efficiency, and onsite support capability.
Built practical systems for testing, operations, and field deployment in constrained enterprise environments.

zh.title: 全栈开发工程师（偏前端）
zh.description: 负责企业级平台与业务系统的前后端开发，参与系统架构设计、功能开发与部署落地。

list.title: 核心内容
items: 基于 Vue、React、Nest 等技术栈推进多项目交付，具备从需求理解到开发实现的完整闭环能力。
主导多个核心模块与工具平台建设，持续提升系统复用性、交付效率与现场实施支持能力。
在复杂企业场景下完成业务系统、工具平台与部署支持相关开发工作。

zh.institution: 伟乐视讯科技股份有限公司

en.title: Frontend Developer
en.description: Worked on frontend implementation, feature integration, and project delivery across multiple business systems.

list.title: Key Responsibilities
items: Handled page development, API integration, and iterative frontend optimization.
Participated in the full delivery flow from requirement review to production-ready page implementation.
Responded quickly to business requirements while maintaining delivery quality.

zh.title: 前端开发工程师
zh.description: 负责前端页面开发、功能联调与项目交付，参与多个业务系统的前端实现与优化。

list.title: 核心内容
items: 熟悉从需求评审到页面落地的开发流程，能够快速响应业务需求并保障交付质量。
参与多个业务系统的前端实现、联调与迭代优化。

zh.institution: 广东紫慧旭光科技有限公司
